title: nissolia stipitata
intro: Nissolia stipitata, also known as the "False Job's Tears", is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nissolia stipitata include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Nissolia stipitata include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
